response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack developer with strong web, TypeScript/Node.js, and DLang background, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems at cloud-compute scale. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and no cloud compute platform or formal technical leadership experience mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers. Core hard requirements are not met.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend
Demonstrated mentoring/teaching via workshops, dojos, and Selenium course
Exposure to high-throughput, low-latency microservices at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: Far below the 8 years C++ requirement — only a short NI C/C++ role
No demonstrated large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed systems leadership
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale distributed systems leadership
